summary_task_agnostic: The video shows a robot arm performing a continuous, smooth counter-clockwise rotation of its base joint. All other joints remain completely static in their initial configuration. The 2x2 grid displays perspective and wrist RGB and depth views correctly.
summary_task_evaluation: The task is fully successful. The robot base rotates smoothly and continuously by more than 180 degrees about the vertical axis. All other joints and the gripper remain strictly in their home configuration throughout the entire clip, with no collisions or chaotic movements.
